title: ANIMALIA Agents (w.i.p.)
description: Evolutionary multi-agent ecosystem simulator designed as an experimental environment for AI agentic systems, where simple agents evolve toward systems with memory, planning, communication, and LLM-based reasoning.

title: Healthcare Document Intelligence
description: AI platform for retrieving and analyzing clinical documentation. Extracts evidence, answers queries on medical records, and supports audits via RAG and LLMs.

title: Urban Mobility Analytics MVP
description: Urban mobility analytics prototype with open SUBE and GTFS data. Geospatial visualizations and indicators for transport planning.

title: QuantLab
description: Modular backtesting and quant analysis platform. Supports Mean Reversion, Momentum and Pairs Trading strategies with an event-driven engine, statistical notebooks, FastAPI backend and dynamic dashboard.

title: Mini DEX
description: Educational DEX in Solidity for swapping ERC-20 tokens with LP fee logic.

title: Price Hunter
description: Scraping and price analysis tool for supermarkets. Detects variations, anomalies, and generates indicators for price transparency.

title: Financial Fraud Detection
description: High-precision predictive model for identifying fraudulent transactions in payment channels using severely imbalanced data.

title: Global Earthquake-Tsunami Risk Assessment
description: Comprehensive analysis and predictive modeling of tsunami risk generated by global seismic activity, with interactive maps.

title: ERP Fullstack — Construction Management
description: Management platform for operations, resources, and finances in civil construction. Centralizes critical information for process visibility and decision-making.

title: ConstruIA
description: AI solution for optimizing planning, cost estimation, and management control in civil construction.
